title: Runic Enchanting Mod Compatibility
description: Makes runic enchanting recipes for several modded enchantments
body:
Only for fabric, because runic enchanting is only for fabric.

This is a datapack that adds compatiblity between runic enchanting, and a bunch of mods. It adds runic enchantment recipes for all enchantments added by the following mods.

- [Farmers Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)
- [Dual Swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/dual-swords)
- [Extended Enchanting](https://modrinth.com/mod/extended-enchanting)
- [Additional Armoury](https://modrinth.com/mod/additional-armoury)
- [Extra Damage Enchantments](https://modrinth.com/mod/extra-damage-enchantments)
- [Guarding](https://modrinth.com/mod/guarding)
- [Biome Makeover](https://modrinth.com/mod/biome-makeover)
- [Enchantery](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantery)
- [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins)
- [Amarite](https://modrinth.com/mod/amarite)
- [Useful Spyglass](https://modrinth.com/mod/useful-spyglass)
